title: The Tezpur University Act, 1993
full_text: The Tezpur University Act, 1993 तेजपुर विश्‍वविद्यालय अधिनियम, 1993 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 199345 Act Number: 45 Enactment Date: 1993-06-01 Act Year: 1993 Short Title: The Tezpur University Act, 1993 Hindi Title: तेजपुर विश्‍वविद्यालय अधिनियम, 1993 Long Title: An Act to establish and incorporate a teaching and residential University in the State of Assam at Tezpur and to provide for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Education Department: Department of Higher Education Enforcement Date: 15-01-1994 Notification: 15th January, 1994vide notification No. G.S.R 22(E), dated 15th January, 1994, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i).
